generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance RobotPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from the motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance RobotPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASInstance : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization for enhanced robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from friction model identification used to enhance robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing real-time robot motion accuracy metrics"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot (MABI Robotic AG) for motion control accuracy improvement in machining applications"
    base:contains CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, SysMLEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements and MQTT streaming for immediate friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of digital shadow reference model components (Purpose, DataTrace, Source, Asset, Processing, Model), Asset Administration Shells (AAS), live-data linking, and unified dashboard for contextual data aggregation and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time operational data used for friction identification during robot operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to assess model accuracy; multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and asset management."
]
